title: potentilla × sulphurascens
intro: Potentilla × sulphurascens, also known as Sulphur Cinquefoil, is a hybrid plant belonging to the Rosaceae family, derived from the cross between Potentilla recta and Potentilla tabernaemontani. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties, which are attributed to its high content of flavonoids and tannins. The health benefits of Potentilla × sulphurascens include its ability to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory and gastrointestinal issues. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being and support the body's natural healing processes.
